GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic unit checks for each module.
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: Integration checks across pipeline stages with synthetic videos.
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Synthetic video end-to-end tests with metric assertions.
GlobalPolicy.gui-testing-focus: Headless-compatible smoke tests (QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen). Worker signal tests with QSignalSpy. Widget rendering tests limited by CI constraints.
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, or raw high-risk payloads.

VF-001.NAME: DetectHappyPath
VF-001.scenario: User provides valid MP4 + SRT — pipeline produces slides.json + images with correct intervals.
VF-001.expected-outcome: slides.json validates, slide images saved, transcript aligned.

VF-002.NAME: ExportMDPath
VF-002.scenario: Valid slides.json → deck.md with correct Marp formatting.

VF-003.NAME: GPUAutoFallback
VF-003.scenario: System without CUDA — auto backend falls back to OpenCV with warning.
VF-003.expected-outcome: Pipeline completes on CPU with WARNING log line.

VF-004.NAME: ExportPptxPath
VF-004.scenario: Valid slides.json + images → deck.pptx with full-slide pictures and speaker notes.
VF-004.expected-outcome: deck.pptx has correct slide count, notes contain cleaned transcript, images embedded.

VF-005.NAME: NotesProcessingPath
VF-005.scenario: Segment with SRT cues → process_notes(basic) → clean speaker notes text.
VF-005.expected-outcome: Raw subtitle fragments joined, punctuated, deduplicated into flowing text.

VF-006.NAME: DetectSlidesNoSubtitles
VF-006.scenario: User runs detect-slides with only a video — no subtitles.
VF-006.expected-outcome: slides.json produced with intervals and representative timestamps. Transcript fields may be empty. No error.

VF-007.NAME: NotesPostProcess
VF-007.scenario: User runs detect first, then later runs notes with different subtitles/notes-mode. No video re-decode.
VF-007.expected-outcome: Notes command loads existing slides.json, aligns new subtitles, generates notes, saves. Runs in seconds, not minutes.

VF-008.NAME: RoiToolVisualSelect
VF-008.scenario: User runs roi-tool with a video, drags a rectangle, presses Enter.
VF-008.expected-outcome: Coordinates printed to stdout in format x1,y1,x2,y2. Window closes cleanly.

VF-009.NAME: ProjectCreateOpen
VF-009.scenario: User creates project with video + subtitles, then opens it.
VF-009.expected-outcome: project.json created with correct schema. On open, paths resolve, configs load. State round-trips correctly.

VF-010.NAME: DetectInProject
VF-010.scenario: User opens a project with video, clicks Detect in GUI. No UI freeze.
VF-010.expected-outcome: Worker emits progress signals. After completion, timeline appears. project.json state updated. slides.json valid.

VF-011.NAME: TimelineInteraction
VF-011.scenario: After detection, user clicks slide blocks on timeline, sees subtitle text.
VF-011.expected-outcome: Timeline shows correct number of blocks matching slide count. Clicking each block displays correct subtitle text and timecodes in side panel.

VF-012.NAME: SettingsLLMPrompt
VF-012.scenario: User opens Settings → LLM tab, edits SYSTEM_PROMPT_REPHRASE, saves.
VF-012.expected-outcome: Edited prompt is saved to project.json and visible on reopen. Takes effect on next LLM processing call.

VF-013.NAME: BackendSelection
VF-013.scenario: User opens Settings → GPU/Backend tab, selects a backend.
VF-013.expected-outcome: Available backends are listed with CUDA availability. Selection saved to project config. Next detect run uses selected backend.

VF-014.NAME: MenuBarActions
VF-014.expected-outcome: All menu items present with correct shortcuts (Ctrl+N/O/S/Q). New/Open → file dialogs → project loaded. Close → project unloaded, UI reset. Save → project.json written. Import Video/Subtitles → project paths updated.

VF-015.NAME: ProjectAppSettings
VF-015.scenario: User opens Project Settings and App Settings from Edit menu.
VF-015.expected-outcome: Project Settings: all detection fields editable, saved to project.json. App Settings: LLM/GPU/snap_mode editable, saved to app-config.yaml. New projects created after app settings change inherit updated defaults.

VF-016.NAME: VideoPlaybackSubtitles
VF-016.scenario: User plays video with subtitle overlay in GUI.
VF-016.expected-outcome: Play/pause/stop work. Time counter updates. Seek slider seeks. Volume slider works. Subtitles render over video and sync with playback. No subtitles → clean video without overlay.

VF-017.NAME: TimelineGreenBlueMarkers
VF-017.scenario: User views detected slides as green markers, double-clicks to open image. User adds blue manual marker, snap adjusts it.
VF-017.expected-outcome: Green markers match slide intervals. Double-click opens image in system viewer. Right-click adds blue marker. Smart snap adjusts position per snap_mode. Marker persisted in project.json and restored on reopen.

VF-018.NAME: SmartSnapModes
VF-018.scenario: User places blue marker near a scene boundary with different snap modes.
VF-018.expected-outcome: diff_only: snaps using existing diff_scores. If none available, marker stays at original position. fallback_analyze: snaps using diff_scores if available, otherwise decodes and analyzes. hybrid: snaps using diff_scores, if graph flat runs high-res analysis. Snapped marker reflects actual scene change.

scenarios.scenario-1: Each successful OpenCV read increments frames_decoded exactly once.
scenarios.scenario-2: OpenCV conversions and RGB bytes equal yielded RGB frames exactly.
scenarios.scenario-3: PyAV counts every decoded frame while conversions and RGB bytes equal yielded frames exactly.
scenarios.scenario-4: PyAV keyframe filtering does not suppress decoded-frame counts.

scenarios.scenario-1: Governed ChangeEvent/detect_changes contracts and detect-init/process/debounce anchors remain uniquely paired and ordered.
detect_slides with video produces slides.json with intervals and images, no transcript.
scenarios.scenario-2: detect_slides with synthetic video returns correct segment count.
scenarios.scenario-3: detect_slides output can be loaded by notes command later.
scenarios.scenario-4: RSS sampler start precedes document construction and persistence, and stop follows persistence.
scenarios.scenario-5: Persistence exceptions propagate after unconditional RSS sampler cleanup.
scenarios.scenario-6: rss_peak_mb equals max(rss_before_mb, sampled peak, rss_after_mb).

scenarios.scenario-1: notes command with slides.json + SRT produces cleaned transcript on segments.
scenarios.scenario-2: notes command without subtitles gracefully handles missing cues.
scenarios.scenario-3: notes command with --notes-mode basic uses _basic_cleanup.
scenarios.scenario-4: Notes mode can be changed and re-run without re-detecting slides.

scenarios.scenario-1: roi_tool CLI command registered and shows in help.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing video raises user-friendly error.
scenarios.scenario-3: Coordinates output format is parseable by --ignore-roi.

scenarios.scenario-1: Create project with video path → project.json exists, contains correct fields.
scenarios.scenario-2: Open existing project.json → loads correct config, resolves paths.
scenarios.scenario-3: Update project state after detect → state.detect_done=true, slides_json set.
scenarios.scenario-4: Project dir missing → raises FileNotFoundError.

scenarios.scenario-1: Main window opens without errors (offscreen).
scenarios.scenario-2: Project toolbar buttons (new/open/save) are clickable.
scenarios.scenario-3: Video file selector opens file dialog.
scenarios.scenario-4: Detect button is disabled when no project is open.

scenarios.scenario-1: Timeline renders correct number of slide blocks matching input data.
scenarios.scenario-2: Clicking a block emits selected_slide_changed signal with correct index.
scenarios.scenario-3: Subtitle panel displays correct text for selected segment.
scenarios.scenario-4: Empty slides list does not crash the widget.

scenarios.scenario-1: Settings dialog opens with correct tab count (≥2).
scenarios.scenario-2: LLM tab shows system prompt in editable text field.
scenarios.scenario-3: Backend tab lists available backends with selection.
scenarios.scenario-4: Save button persists changes to project.json.

scenarios.scenario-1: AppConfigManager loads/saves app-config.yaml correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: Missing config file returns defaults, does not crash.
scenarios.scenario-3: New project creation inherits app config defaults (LLM, GPU, snap_mode).
scenarios.scenario-4: Config directory created automatically if missing.

scenarios.scenario-1: diff_only with valid diff_scores: snaps to nearest peak within ±5s.
scenarios.scenario-2: diff_only with no diff_scores: returns original timestamp unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: fallback_analyze with no diff_scores: decodes window, computes differences, finds boundary.
scenarios.scenario-4: hybrid with flat diff_scores: falls back to high-res analysis.
scenarios.scenario-5: hybrid with clear diff_scores peak: uses diff_only path.

scenarios.scenario-1: Add marker → calls smart_snap → marker stored with original + snapped timestamps.
scenarios.scenario-2: Delete marker → removed from project.json markers list.
scenarios.scenario-3: Load project with existing markers → markers restored and rendered on timeline.
scenarios.scenario-4: Re-snap marker → re-runs snap with current settings, updates position.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dialog opens with current project config values pre-filled.
scenarios.scenario-2: Edit ROI, threshold, fps → OK → values saved to project.json.
scenarios.scenario-3: Cancel → no changes to project.json.
scenarios.scenario-4: Invalid ROI format → error message, not saved.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dialog shows LLM, GPU, Snap, Default Paths tabs.
scenarios.scenario-2: Edit snap_mode → saved to app-config.yaml.
scenarios.scenario-3: Edit GPU backend → saved to app-config.yaml.
scenarios.scenario-4: New project after app settings change inherits new defaults.

scenarios.scenario-1: Video player widget creates without errors (offscreen).
scenarios.scenario-2: Play/pause/stop buttons emit correct signals.
scenarios.scenario-3: Seek slider updates player position.
scenarios.scenario-4: Volume slider adjusts audio output.
scenarios.scenario-5: Time counter shows formatted MM:SS / total.

scenarios.scenario-1: Subtitle file parsed → cues loaded correctly.
scenarios.scenario-2: positionChanged(10.5) → visible text matches cue at that timestamp.
scenarios.scenario-3: No subtitle file → overlay shows nothing (hidden/blank).
scenarios.scenario-4: Between cues → overlay shows nothing.
scenarios.scenario-5: Seeking updates subtitle immediately.

scenarios.scenario-1: Green markers rendered at correct positions matching slides intervals.
scenarios.scenario-2: Double-click green marker → QDesktopServices.openUrl called with image path.
scenarios.scenario-3: Right-click on timeline → context menu appears with Add Marker option.
scenarios.scenario-4: Blue markers rendered at correct positions.
scenarios.scenario-5: Click marker → emits marker_selected signal with timestamp.
scenarios.scenario-6: Context menu Delete Marker → emits marker_deleted signal.

scenarios.scenario-1: File menu contains all expected items with correct shortcuts.
scenarios.scenario-2: File > Close triggers project_close signal, UI resets.
scenarios.scenario-3: File > Save triggers project_save signal, project.json written.
scenarios.scenario-4: File > Import Video triggers project_import_video signal with new path.
scenarios.scenario-5: Edit menu contains Project Settings and App Settings items.
scenarios.scenario-6: Menu items disabled when no project loaded (Close, Save, Import, Project Settings).

scenarios.scenario-1: DetectWorker runs detect on a project, emits finished signal with slides.json path.
scenarios.scenario-2: Worker emits progress signals during execution.
scenarios.scenario-3: Error signal on missing video file.
scenarios.scenario-4: Worker can be cancelled via requestInterruption.

Gate-Phase-7.goal: detect-slides and notes commands work independently. detect (all-in-one) remains backwards compatible.

Gate-Phase-8.goal: roi-tool command opens window, selects region, prints coordinates.

Gate-Phase-9.goal: Project system: create, open, update, CLI round-trip. project.json schema stable.

Gate-Phase-10.goal: Desktop GUI: main window, timeline, settings, background workers. All tests pass in offscreen mode.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_main.py tests/test_gui_timeline.py tests/test_gui_settings.py tests/test_gui_workers.py -v

Gate-Phase-11.goal: Desktop GUI enhancements: menu bar, video player, subtitle overlay, enhanced timeline, project/app settings, app-wide config, smart snap. All new modules tested. Core pipeline unchanged.

commands.command-1: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest tests/test_gui_menu_bar.py tests/test_gui_video_player.py tests/test_gui_subtitle_overlay.py tests/test_gui_timeline_v2.py tests/test_gui_marker_manager.py tests/test_gui_smart_snap.py tests/test_gui_settings_project.py tests/test_gui_settings_app.py tests/test_gui_app_config.py -v
commands.command-2: pytest tests/ -x --tb=short # all existing tests still pass

Gate-Phase-12.goal: Domain model refactoring: ProjectModel + TimelineModel extracted from MainWindow. 15 model tests pass.

Gate-Phase-14.goal: Debug infrastructure: LogBridge, DebugDock (Ctrl+D), SignalSpy, MCP Server, ActionRegistry. 26 debug tests pass. All 454+ tests pass.

scenarios.scenario-1: Clip generates uid, duration property, contains/overlaps work.
scenarios.scenario-2: SlideClip.to_segment/from_segment round-trip preserves all fields.
scenarios.scenario-3: Track emits clipAdded signal on add_clip, clipRemoved on remove_clip.
scenarios.scenario-4: Track.sort() orders clips by start_sec.
scenarios.scenario-5: Timeline emits durationChanged signal on duration setter.

scenarios.scenario-1: Initial state: not open, timeline is Timeline instance.
scenarios.scenario-2: add_slide creates manual SlideClip, adds to track, emits slidesChanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: delete_slide removes by index, reindexes remaining, emits slidesChanged.
scenarios.scenario-4: close clears all state, projectClosed emitted, slides list empty.
scenarios.scenario-5: set_scores populates ScoreTrack with correct number of clips.

scenarios.scenario-1: Singleton pattern: LogBridge.instance() returns same object.
scenarios.scenario-2: Loguru message captured and emitted via newLog signal with correct level/time/message.
scenarios.scenario-3: recent(n) returns entries with correct fields.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dock created with title "Debug" and 2 tabs (Logs + State).
scenarios.scenario-2: LogPanel.append renders log entry with level prefix.
scenarios.scenario-3: LogPanel filter combo contains ALL, ERROR levels.
scenarios.scenario-4: StatePanel shows tree from Timeline with correct clip count.

scenarios.scenario-1: watch subscribes to named Qt signal on QObject.
scenarios.scenario-2: watch_all discovers and subscribes to signals on Timeline/Track.

scenarios.scenario-1: @mcp_action decorator attaches _mcp_meta with name/desc.
scenarios.scenario-2: ActionRegistry.scan finds decorated methods, skips undecorated.
scenarios.scenario-3: tools() returns MCP descriptors with inputSchema from type hints.
scenarios.scenario-4: call dispatches to bound method with signature-bound args.

scenarios.scenario-1: StatusBarManager.start/update/finish update status bar text.
SubtitleEditorDialog opens with slide info, accepts changes on OK.
TimelineWidget V3 renders slide blocks and emits signals on interaction.
MarkerPanel dialog shows slide list with count.
RoiSelectorDialog uses QRubberBand for rectangle selection.
McpServer starts on port 9812, tools/list returns expected tools.
scenarios.scenario-2: ActionRegistry integration: @mcp_action methods appear in tools/list.

scenarios.scenario-1: Colab notebook loads and imports all required modules.
create → status=queued, trace_id set.
scenarios.scenario-2: update running sets started_at; terminal sets finished_at.
scenarios.scenario-3: wait polls until terminal or timeout.
scenarios.scenario-4: cancel marks non-terminal op cancelled; terminal op unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-5: clear empties registry.

scenarios.scenario-1: OperationError carries type/message/stage/recoverable/trace_id/details.
scenarios.scenario-2: to_dict() excludes None fields.
scenarios.scenario-3: full traceback logged but not in JSON response.

scenarios.scenario-1: Destructive op without confirm=true raises ConfirmRequiredError.
scenarios.scenario-2: Non-destructive op proceeds without confirm.
scenarios.scenario-3: VIDEO2PPTX_TEST_MODE=1 still requires explicit confirm for delete/overwrite.

scenarios.scenario-1: write_json_atomic writes valid JSON; old file replaced.
scenarios.scenario-2: No temp file left behind on success.
scenarios.scenario-3: Partial write on exception leaves target intact.

scenarios.scenario-1: Write tool returns {operation_id, status:queued}.
scenarios.scenario-2: OpRunnerThread runs app_service, op→succeeded with result.
scenarios.scenario-3: app_service failure → op→failed with StructuredError, trace_id preserved.
scenarios.scenario-4: wait_operation returns terminal status without fixed sleep.
scenarios.scenario-5: cancel_operation transitions running op→cancelled, worker stops.
scenarios.scenario-6: Concurrent conflicting ops serialized; no concurrent slides.json write.

scenarios.scenario-1: get_ui_state returns button map with visible/enabled/text per spec.
scenarios.scenario-2: get_project includes video/subtitle paths, duration, cue count, slide count, pipeline states, artifact paths, stale flags.
scenarios.scenario-3: get_timeline returns slide/subtitle/score tracks with UID/intervals/manual/image_path.
scenarios.scenario-4: list_artifacts enumerates project files with sizes.

scenarios.scenario-1: Each write tool validates args via JSON schema; int published as integer.
scenarios.scenario-2: slide_index is 1-based in public API; uid preferred.
scenarios.scenario-3: Missing required arg returns schema error, not silent default.
scenarios.scenario-4: app_shutdown(confirm=true) stops workers+MCP+Qt, frees port, exits 0.

scenarios.scenario-1: read_ui_state returns all 7 buttons with visible/enabled/text.
scenarios.scenario-2: busy flag reflects active operation; current_operation set.

scenarios.scenario-1: Valid project → valid=true, empty errors.
scenarios.scenario-2: Interval overlap/gap/negative → error.
scenarios.scenario-3: Double image path prefix (slides/slides/) → error.
scenarios.scenario-4: Slide count mismatch project.json vs slides.json → error.
scenarios.scenario-5: PPTX re-opens via python-pptx; MD has correct Marp slide count.

scenarios.scenario-1: After detect: detect_done=true, align/notes/md/pptx/auto + stale flags set.
scenarios.scenario-2: Re-detect invalidates downstream (stale=true).
scenarios.scenario-3: Auto with no subs: align/notes status=skipped, not succeeded.

scenarios.scenario-1: slide_delete by uid removes correct slide; UIDs of others preserved.
scenarios.scenario-2: slide_index 1-based in public API; off-by-one fixed across paths.
scenarios.scenario-3: GUI/MCP/CLI invoke same canonical command.

scenarios.scenario-1: 5 buttons present: Quick Preview, Detect, Auto Align, Process Notes, Auto.
scenarios.scenario-2: Quick Preview side-effect-free: no slides.json/deck created; scores present.
scenarios.scenario-3: Button enablement reflects project state (no project→disabled; subs+detect→Auto Align enabled).

scenarios.scenario-1: Coordinated choice honors min_duration (no short neighbor created).
scenarios.scenario-2: Idempotent: 2nd run does not drift boundaries further.
scenarios.scenario-3: dry_run returns plan without mutating slides.
scenarios.scenario-4: include_manual=false leaves manual boundaries unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-5: cue-split count after ≤ before; max-overlap assignment.
scenarios.scenario-6: rollback restores visual boundaries from report.

scenarios.scenario-1: run_detect marks downstream stale; no export side-effects.
scenarios.scenario-2: run_auto(full) produces slides.json+deck.md+deck.pptx; auto_done=true only if valid.
scenarios.scenario-3: run_auto(resume) skips non-stale completed stages.
scenarios.scenario-4: Stage failure halts pipeline, keeps good artifacts, returns failing stage.

scenarios.scenario-1: Port 9812 busy → falls back to 9813..9816; .mcp_port updated.
scenarios.scenario-2: Stale .mcp_port detected and replaced.
scenarios.scenario-3: Restart in same process clears registry + stale _running.
scenarios.scenario-4: Bind to 127.0.0.1 only (not 0.0.0.0).
scenarios.scenario-5: serverInfo.version matches package version.

scenarios.scenario-1: Snapshot captures app/ui/project/timeline/artifacts/logs keys.
scenarios.scenario-2: project.json + slides.json copied into snapshot dir when present.
scenarios.scenario-3: before/after snapshots diffable (stable key order).

scenarios.scenario-1: Launches GUI, finds port via .mcp_port (no guessing), initialize+tools/list pass.
scenarios.scenario-2: Before/after snapshots captured per step; project.json/slides.json copied.
scenarios.scenario-3: Synchronization via wait_operation (no arbitrary sleep).
scenarios.scenario-4: HTML+JSON+junit report emitted; defects.json on failure.

scenarios.scenario-E2E-001: App launch: health, initialize, tools/list, idle UI, no startup errors.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-002: project_create: dir+project.json, title updated, Save enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-003: video_import: path recorded, duration>0, Detect/Preview/Auto enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-004: subtitle_import: cue count matches, monotonic, Auto Align disabled until detect.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-005: playback seek/play/pause; subtitle overlay matches cue.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-006: Quick Preview: scores present, no slides.json, idempotent 2nd run.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-007: Detect: slides.json valid, images exist, no exports, Auto Align enabled.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-008: Auto Align dry_run: plan only, project unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-009: Auto Align apply: count/order preserved, report created, cue-split non-increasing, idempotent.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-010: Process Notes basic: notes_done, cleaned transcript, no exports.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-011: Slide CRUD round-trip via uid; off-by-one fixed; save/open preserves.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-012: Export MD: Marp slide count matches, no slides/slides path, images exist.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-013: Export PPTX: valid zip, re-opens, notes present, unicode preserved.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-015: Auto full on clean project: all stages, auto_done=true, resume no-op, force recompute.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-101: No-subtitle project: Auto skips align/notes (status=skipped), exports created.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-102: Nonexistent video → failed, not hang, not crash.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-104: Re-detect replaces intervals, invalidates downstream, no modal block.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-106: Cancel long op: worker stops, op=cancelled, no partial slides.json as ready.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-108: app_shutdown(confirm=true): clean exit, port freed, code 0.
scenarios.scenario-E2E-109: Busy port 9812 → fallback discovered by runner.

scenarios.scenario-1: docs/architecture.md exists with layers, dependency rules, sequence diagrams, migration table.

V-M-DOMAIN-SLIDE.purpose: Slide entity invariants: stable SlideId, visual/aligned TimeInterval, ArtifactRef, transcript, confidence, manual flag.

V-M-DOMAIN-STATE.purpose: Pipeline stage state machine transitions: NOT_STARTED -> RUNNING -> SUCCEEDED/FAILED/CANCELLED/STALE/SKIPPED.

V-M-DOMAIN-EVENTS.purpose: Domain event dataclasses (ProjectCreated, SlidesDetected, SlidesAligned, NotesProcessed, SlideAdded).

V-M-PORT-EVENTS.purpose: Synchronous event bus: publish domain events, notify subscribers, Qt signal adapter.

V-M-APP-PROJECT.purpose: Project service use case: create/open/close/save via repository port without direct file access.

scenarios.scenario-1: TimeInterval(start, end): end > start enforced, duration computed, contains/overlaps methods.
scenarios.scenario-2: TimeInterval(end <= start) raises ValidationError.
scenarios.scenario-3: SlideId: uuid-based, stable across renames.
scenarios.scenario-4: ArtifactRef: normalizes path, prevents double prefix, resolves relative to project dir.
scenarios.scenario-5: PipelineState: valid transitions, terminal states, cannot restart from succeeded without force.

scenarios.scenario-1: add_slide(): stable SlideId, correct index assignment.
scenarios.scenario-2: remove_slide(): other SlideIds preserved, indices recalculated.
scenarios.scenario-3: move_slide(): overlap prevented by domain invariant.
scenarios.scenario-4: replace_detected_slides(): replaces all, invalidates downstream.
scenarios.scenario-5: invalidate_downstream_from('detect'): align/notes/md/pptx all stale.

scenarios.scenario-1: Save → load round-trip preserves all fields.
scenarios.scenario-2: Atomic write: crash during write leaves previous version intact.
scenarios.scenario-3: Schema migration: v1 project.json upgrades to v2 on load.
scenarios.scenario-4: Loading invalid project.json raises ProjectPersistenceError.

evidence.result: 46 module tests passed; 104 domain+infra tests passed; Ruff passed. mypy unavailable, see F-0060.

scenarios.scenario-1: ProjectDocumentV2 strictly round-trips every canonical aggregate field.
scenarios.scenario-2: Unknown canonical fields are rejected outside extensions.

evidence.result: 22 targeted tests passed; domain+infra and full non-E2E regression passed; Ruff passed.

scenarios.scenario-1: Schema 1.0 migrates deterministically to schema 2.0 with stable slide IDs.
scenarios.scenario-2: Unknown legacy fields survive under extensions.legacy.

module-checks.check-1: python -m pytest tests/infra/test_file_repository.py tests/infra/test_mapper.py tests/infra/test_migrations.py tests/infra/test_persistence_dto.py -q

evidence.result: Repository/mapper tests, domain+infra, and full non-E2E regression passed; Ruff passed. source_revision, derived mismatch recovery, and canonical-on-derived-failure are covered.

scenarios.scenario-1: LoadedProject revision supports an optimistic load-edit-save cycle.
scenarios.scenario-2: Corrupt canonical storage and revision conflicts fail without overwrite.
scenarios.scenario-3: Derived slides artifact records and validates source_revision.

evidence.result: All 5.0A–5.0D module, wave, and full non-E2E gates passed; Ruff passed. mypy remains unavailable per F-0060.

scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-1: Schema 2.0 is parsed through ProjectDocumentV2, not LegacyProject.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-2: Full PipelineState round-trip preserves FAILED, STALE, CANCELLED, SKIPPED, operation_id, error, timestamps.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-3: Load does not invalidate pipeline stages (rehydration has no business side effects).
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-4: load() returns LoadedProject with revision; standard load→edit→save uses expected_revision.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-5: output_dir is not persisted in schema 2.0; project root is runtime context.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-6: slides.json contains source_revision matching project.json revision.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-7: Corrupt existing project.json with expected_revision raises ProjectDocumentCorrupted, not silent overwrite.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-8: validate_storage performs DTO validation, domain mapping, and derived revision check.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-9: Unknown legacy fields are preserved in extensions.legacy.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-10: project.validate() checks aggregate invariants without mutating state.
scenarios.scenario-PERSIST-11: SlideId.new() generates 128-bit UUID; legacy IDs preserved as-is.

scenarios.scenario-1: Preview succeeds, waveform updated, slides unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-2: Invalid analyzer output → preview=FAILED, aggregate unchanged.
scenarios.scenario-3: Cancellation raises before aggregate mutation.
scenarios.scenario-4: Revision conflict → PersistenceConflictError.

scenarios.scenario-1: Detection replaces slides, invalidates downstream, saves with revision.
scenarios.scenario-2: Adapter failure → detect=FAILED, old slides preserved.
scenarios.scenario-3: No notes/export/align side effects.
scenarios.scenario-4: Overlapping candidates → rejection before aggregate mutation.

scenarios.scenario-1: Dry-run returns metrics without saving or mutating pipeline.
scenarios.scenario-2: Apply updates intervals, saves, invalidates downstream.
scenarios.scenario-3: Idempotent second apply produces identical intervals.
scenarios.scenario-4: Invalid plan → rejection before aggregate mutation.

scenarios.scenario-1: Basic mode enriches transcript from subtitle cues.
scenarios.scenario-2: LLM mode with unavailable gateway returns error, no silent fallback.
scenarios.scenario-3: Raw subtitle cues preserved after processing.

scenarios.scenario-1: Markdown staged, validated, atomically replaced.
scenarios.scenario-2: PPTX reopened through python-pptx, slide/image counts match.
scenarios.scenario-3: overwrite=false with existing file → controlled error.

scenarios.scenario-1: Valid canonical storage, media, artifacts, and exports produce valid=true.
scenarios.scenario-2: Domain invariant or derived revision mismatch produces a typed validation error.
scenarios.scenario-3: Missing or structurally invalid export is reported without mutating project state.

scenarios.scenario-1: Full mode runs all stages, validation passes.
scenarios.scenario-2: Resume skips SUCCEEDED stages, re-runs STALE/FAILED.
scenarios.scenario-3: Force re-runs all stages.
scenarios.scenario-4: Stage failure halts pipeline, records which stage failed.

evidence.result: Phase 16 complete: 178 domain+application+infra wave passed; 15 characterization tests passed; Ruff clear (pre-existing issues). All services implemented with revision-safe ports + dry-run.

scenarios.scenario-1: Services depend only on domain and ports and use repository revisions on every mutation.
scenarios.scenario-2: Cancellation and adapter failures leave aggregate invariants intact and record typed stage failures.
scenarios.scenario-3: Auto composes stage services for full, resume, and force modes without duplicating algorithms.

scenarios.scenario-CHAR-001: Direct application call: Detect produces same slides.json as CLI detect.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-002: MCP detect produces same slides.json as direct call.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-003: Slide CRUD via MCP matches slide CRUD via GUI.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-005: Quick Preview is idempotent and creates no slide/export artifacts.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-006: MCP terminal success implies project, timeline, disk, and UI synchronization.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-007: Auto Align dry-run is side-effect free; apply preserves invariants and is idempotent.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-008: UID-based slide CRUD keeps project, timeline, project.json, and slides.json consistent.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-009: Save/Close/Open preserves normalized project state and disables all project actions while closed.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-010: MCP Markdown and PPTX exports match source slide/image counts and preserve project identity.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-011: Video and subtitle import set correct project paths, subtitle clips, and button enablement.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-012: Process Notes enriches transcript text and sets notes_done.
scenarios.scenario-CHAR-013: Full Auto completes detect+align+notes+export in a single clean project with all artifacts.

evidence.result: All 11 real GUI+MCP characterization tests passed; full available suite passed with 8 skips; changed-file Ruff check passed.

scenarios.scenario-1: MCP preview, detect, align, notes, export, and auto dispatch through Phase 16 services.
scenarios.scenario-2: Legacy algorithms are reachable only through concrete application port adapters.
scenarios.scenario-3: Quick Preview creates no slide artifacts; alignment apply is idempotent and writes its report.
scenarios.scenario-4: Markdown and PPTX preserve project title, images, notes, and canonical pipeline state.
scenarios.scenario-5: GUI slide CRUD and save/open retain schema 2.0 and revisioned repository persistence.

module-checks.check-1: python -m pytest tests/test_cli_characterization.py tests/test_cli_adapter_core.py tests/test_cli_adapter_commands.py tests/test_cli_architecture.py tests/test_bootstrap.py -q

scenarios.scenario-1: Freeze command names, arguments, options, usage errors, missing-file behavior, and legacy detect semantic migration.
scenarios.scenario-2: Project commands create/load/query strict schema 2.0 state through application services.
scenarios.scenario-3: Preview, detect, align, notes, LLM, Markdown, PPTX, validate, and auto each invoke the matching canonical service.
scenarios.scenario-4: Central error mapper produces stable precondition, validation, conflict, adapter, and cancellation exit codes without traceback.
scenarios.scenario-5: Ctrl+C triggers the operation CancellationToken and returns the documented cancelled code.
scenarios.scenario-6: CLI pipeline modules contain no forbidden legacy pipeline/project imports and no orchestration sequence outside AutoService.
scenarios.scenario-7: Application direct, MCP, and CLI produce semantically equivalent slides, pipeline state, and revisioned artifacts.
scenarios.scenario-8: All 11 real GUI+MCP characterization tests remain passing; F-0058 stays open for Step 8.

stop-conditions.condition-1: Stop if public CLI options cannot reach service/port contracts without silent loss.
stop-conditions.condition-2: Stop if canonical project writes regress to legacy project_manager or mutable slides.json.
stop-conditions.condition-3: Stop if LLM mode silently falls back to basic processing.

V-M-REF-GUI-ADAPTER.purpose: Step 8.5 proves that the real MainWindow uses one canonical project state, asynchronous operation-scoped services, SlideId-only domain mutations, persistent ArtifactRef frames, and non-blocking Qt integration.

module-checks.check-1: python -m pytest tests/gui/test_project_controller.py tests/gui/test_pipeline_controller.py tests/gui/test_timeline_controller.py tests/gui/test_main_window_integration.py -q

evidence.result: CI: all 12 jobs green (gui-test, lint, package, 6x matrix, 2x unit-tests, 2x mcp-smoke). Local: 51 targeted GUI/controller tests; full non-E2E suite 947 pass; 11 real GUI+MCP characterization tests pass; Ruff clean; MainWindow 596 physical lines.

scenarios.scenario-1: ProjectController creates/open/saves/closes projects through FileProjectRepository.
scenarios.scenario-2: Controller emits projectOpened/projectClosed/stateChanged/errorOccurred Qt signals.
scenarios.scenario-3: Architecture test forbids legacy pipeline imports in gui/controllers/.
scenarios.scenario-4: PipelineController runs stage services through ApplicationServices in a QThread.
scenarios.scenario-5: TimelineController provides slide CRUD through ApplicationServices with revision-safe saves.
scenarios.scenario-6: Controller emits errorOccurred on create(already exists)/open(not found)/save(revision conflict).
scenarios.scenario-7: Detect, auto, notes, and export return control to the Qt event loop before service completion.
scenarios.scenario-8: A service ProgressUpdate reaches PipelineController.progress and MainWindow status UI through the actual operation ServiceContext.
scenarios.scenario-9: Real MainWindow create, open, and recent-open update labels, timeline, and canonical state from one project-open event.
scenarios.scenario-10: Timeline add/delete/move/resize/clear/set-frame resolves display index to SlideId at MainWindow boundary; controller/domain receive no index.
scenarios.scenario-11: Set frame stores a matching file and ArtifactRef and survives close/open.
scenarios.scenario-12: Detect, align, move, and delete followed by save do not raise ProjectRevisionConflict.
scenarios.scenario-13: videoChanged uses QWidget.setEnabled(bool), and playback routing F-0058 reaches the video player.
scenarios.scenario-14: MainWindow remains structurally below 600 physical LOC without multi-operation lambdas or statement packing.
scenarios.scenario-15: Required GitHub Actions jobs are green and every historical failure is classified PRODUCT_BUG, TEST_BUG, or CI_ENVIRONMENT.

stop-conditions.condition-1: Stop if controller code imports video2pptx.project_manager, video2pptx.models, video2pptx.detect_slides, or any legacy pipeline module.
stop-conditions.condition-2: Stop if controller mutates domain objects without going through ApplicationServices.
stop-conditions.condition-3: Stop if any pipeline stage executes on QApplication.instance().thread().
stop-conditions.condition-4: Stop if ProjectController and ProjectModel retain independently writable project snapshots.
stop-conditions.condition-5: Stop if MainWindow is 600 or more physical lines.
stop-conditions.condition-6: Stop if any required GitHub workflow remains red.

scenarios.scenario-1: domain/ does not import application, infrastructure, adapters, PySide6.
scenarios.scenario-2: application/ does not import gui, mcp, cli, PySide6.
scenarios.scenario-3: GUI does not import direct json.load/json.dump from persistence.
scenarios.scenario-4: MCP does not import MainWindow.

V-M-REF-LEGACY.purpose: Dead legacy modules removed, @mcp_action/ActionRegistry gone, architecture tests enforce clean layering.

evidence.result: Deleted 6 dead modules (1982 lines), removed ActionRegistry (253 lines), 9 architecture tests pass, 928 non-E2E tests pass, 11 MCP char tests pass.

V-M-REF-CANONICAL-ROUTE.purpose: Canonical route closure, DetectionConfig propagation, operation lifecycle.

evidence.result: DetectionConfig added to domain/Project. DetectionService resolves all inputs from Project. PipelineController/CLI/MCP use None defaults. Effective config logged in ServiceResult. F-0075/F-0076 resolved. CI: 10/13 green (3 Qt segfault/Xvfb env limitations). 928 non-E2E tests + 20 architecture tests pass.

V-M-REF-DETECTION-INPUT.purpose: DetectionConfig schema 2.0 persistence round-trip, input resolution contract across all services.

scenarios.scenario-1: DetectionConfigDocument in project.json, to_domain→Project.detection, to_document→schema 2.0.
scenarios.scenario-2: Legacy extensions.detection migrated to canonical DetectionConfig with deterministic precedence.
scenarios.scenario-3: Detect/Preview/Auto resolve video_path from Project when override is None/""/" ".
scenarios.scenario-4: ProjectSettingsDialog saves through canonical Project+repository, not legacy project_manager.
scenarios.scenario-5: decoder_backend reaches SlideDetectorPort and VideoDecoder config.
scenarios.scenario-6: None override→project value, explicit override wins, missing project→PreconditionError.

V-M-REF-PRODUCT-IDENTITY.purpose: Application identity, version consistency, About dialog, Help menu, diagnostic info.

evidence.result: ApplicationIdentity with version/build/repository. AboutDialog shows version, build SHA, runtime. Help menu has About/Logs/GitHub. __version__ is single source. MainWindow under 600 LOC.

scenarios.scenario-1: AboutDialog and MainWindow construct with canonical runtime branding imports and visible logo wiring.

V-M-REF-PACKAGING-INVENTORY.purpose: Runtime dependency map, dynamic imports, Qt plugins, native DLLs, video backends.

evidence.result: packaging/windows/inventory.md documents all dependencies, Qt plugins, native DLLs, backend requirements, dynamic imports, and excluded dev packages.

V-M-REF-STANDALONE-BUILD.purpose: Desktop entry point, PyInstaller onedir spec, COLLECT output, canonical layout.

evidence.result: dist/windows/Video2PPTX/Video2PPTX.exe is the canonical standalone path. spec produces onedir with COLLECT. build.ps1 validates layout.

V-M-REF-UPDATE-CHECKER.purpose: Update checker: UpdateService, GitHubReleaseProvider, UpdateController, UpdateAvailableDialog.

scenarios.scenario-1: no releases → NO_RELEASES
scenarios.scenario-2: current == latest → UP_TO_DATE
scenarios.scenario-3: latest > current → UPDATE_AVAILABLE
scenarios.scenario-4: multiple releases picks highest version
scenarios.scenario-5: invalid tag ignored gracefully
scenarios.scenario-11: normalize_tag returns None for invalid versions
scenarios.scenario-17: empty assets tuple when no assets
scenarios.scenario-18: installer asset found by expected pattern

V-M-REF-PACKAGED-MCP.purpose: Packaged MCP smoke test: port discovery, initialize, tools/list, state read, shutdown.

scenarios.scenario-1: packaged EXE launches and MCP port is discovered within 15s
scenarios.scenario-2: MCP initialize responds
scenarios.scenario-3: MCP tools/list returns tool list
scenarios.scenario-4: application state readable
scenarios.scenario-5: clean process exit

V-M-REF-PACKAGING-PARITY.purpose: Packaged runtime capability verification, BuildInfo propagation, --diagnostics flag.

scenarios.scenario-1: --diagnostics prints all required module capabilities
scenarios.scenario-2: BuildInfo preserves commit_sha, build_type, packaging_tool, build_time
scenarios.scenario-3: About dialog shows packaging_tool when available
scenarios.scenario-4: source mode shows BuildType.SOURCE without error

V-M-REF-CLEAN-WINDOWS.purpose: Clean Windows VM/Sandbox verification of installer and portable ZIP.

scenarios.scenario-1: installer starts and installs on clean Windows without Python
scenarios.scenario-2: application starts from Start Menu shortcut
scenarios.scenario-3: About opens with correct version/build metadata
scenarios.scenario-4: project create and basic workflow completes
scenarios.scenario-5: update checker offline behavior works
scenarios.scenario-6: uninstall removes application but preserves user projects

V-M-REF-WIN-INSTALLER.purpose: Inno Setup installer: canonical layout and icon, accepted README payload, no dead .v2pp association, no invalid --uninstall hook.

evidence.result: Static installer recovery checks pass: accepted README payload once, one canonical SetupIconFile, canonical bundle source, and no invalid legacy sections.

scenarios.scenario-1: Installer sources from dist/windows/Video2PPTX/*
scenarios.scenario-2: No [UninstallRun] section (removed invalid --uninstall)
scenarios.scenario-3: No [Registry] section for .v2pp (removed dead file association)
scenarios.scenario-4: Repository README.md is installed exactly once.
scenarios.scenario-5: SetupIconFile occurs exactly once and names the canonical Video2PPTX.ico asset.

V-M-REF-WIN-RELEASE.purpose: GitHub Actions release workflow: correct deps, version validation, prerelease parsing.

scenarios.scenario-1: windows-release dependency profile used instead of dev
scenarios.scenario-2: workflow_dispatch resolves version from package, not tag
scenarios.scenario-3: tag workflow validates tag == package version, fails on mismatch
scenarios.scenario-4: prerelease determined by packaging.version, not string contains
scenarios.scenario-5: build metadata uses build_type=standalone (not installer)
scenarios.scenario-6: workflow_dispatch does not create GitHub Release

V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE.purpose: Performance baseline instrumentation: DetectionRunMetrics schema, to_dict/from_dict round-trip, measure() context manager, per-frame timers/counters, backend counters (frames_decoded, ndarray_conversions, rgb_transfer_bytes), RssSampler peak RSS (rss_before_mb, rss_peak_mb, rss_after_mb), representative frame evidence (representative_frames, representative_frame_bytes).

evidence.result: Metrics typed round-trip PASS: to_dict() → from_dict() → exact values. measure() records time, inactive overhead negligible. RssSampler lifecycle recovery PASS requires deterministic start/document/persist/stop ordering, separate before-highest, sampled-highest, and after-highest peak cases, detector-work exception cleanup before document construction, and persistence-exception cleanup. Backend telemetry recovery PASS requires exact OpenCV and PyAV decoded-frame, conversion, RGB-transfer-byte, and PyAV keyframe-filter semantics plus container close on normal and decode/iteration failure paths. Fixture-backed benchmark contract evidence is not claimed in this recovery because F-0093 blocks execution. When the fixture is restored, the pending gate must verify: - timer_total > 0, timer_extract_features > 0 - frames_sampled (Pass 1 only) > 0 - pass2_frames_sampled (Pass 2) > 0 - features_full + features_quick == frames_sampled invariant - frames_decoded >= ndarray_conversions >= frames_sampled + pass2_frames_sampled - representative_frames > 0, representative_frame_bytes > 0 - rss_before_mb > 0 (when psutil available), rss_peak_mb >= max(rss_before_mb, rss_after_mb) - screenshots_written == actual PNG count - rgb_transfer_bytes > 0

V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE.notes: Step 18.1 is done. Deterministic instrumentation evidence and the accepted recovered-tree r2 benchmark close the baseline gate; F-0093 and F-0094 remain documented environment/test isolation gaps and do not change the passed baseline status.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-TWO-PASS.purpose: Two-pass detection: collapse Pass 3 (screenshot save) into Pass 2 (dedup frame grab). decoder.iter_frames() called exactly 2 times regardless of dedup mode. Output parity verified against pre-TwoPass 3-pass reference from commit 3472e62.

evidence.result: Decoder call count PASS: iter_frames called exactly 2 times (dedup on + dedup off). Output parity PASS vs 3472e62 3-pass reference (1e-4 tolerance): - score_timestamps parity within abs tolerance 1e-4 - score_values parity within abs tolerance 1e-4 - segment index exact - segment start/end/representative_timestamp parity within abs tolerance 1e-4 - image paths exact match - screenshot count exact match - per-screenshot relative paths exact match - per-screenshot SHA-256 exact match Screenshots valid PNG PASS. No Pass 3/3 markers PASS.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-SHORT-BENCHMARK.purpose: Run the immutable short-video benchmark on the recovered tree; historical 8623cd2 evidence is context only and cannot select an optimization. The c372ced series is SUPERSEDED_FOR_STEP_18_3_ACCEPTANCE; r2 series (BENCHMARK_CODE_HEAD=465d89e) completed.

evidence.profile-supporting-evidence: NON_EMPTY; supporting only and excluded from stage accounting

V-M-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK.purpose: Select a bottleneck class only from accepted recovered-tree benchmark evidence, or honestly report insufficient discrimination.
V-M-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK.verification-contract: 1. Wall-clock stage timers from median run (run-01, 272.57s) are the primary evidence. 2. cProfile cumulative hierarchy is secondary — must resolve wall-clock overlap regions. 3. Candidate bottleneck classes (mutually exclusive, collectively exhaustive): - FEATURE_EXTRACTION_CPU - DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE - PASS2_COLLECTION - THRESHOLD_OR_DECISION_LOGIC - MIXED_OR_UNRESOLVED 4. If evidence cannot safely discriminate one class, status=BLOCKED_INSUFFICIENT_DISCRIMINATION with no selected class and no optimization. 5. If a class IS selected, exactly one targeted optimization must be selected (name, code boundaries, hypothesis). 6. Acceptance gates must be defined for step 18.6 re-benchmark. 7. Verification artifacts: bottleneck_decision.json (machine-parseable), bottleneck_decision.md (human-readable rationale).

evidence.result: Bottleneck class: DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE — SAFELY DISCRIMINATED. Confidence: HIGH. Selected optimization: NONE. F-0097 RESOLVED. F-0098 RESOLVED (activation-defect discrimination): canonical production-path evidence (Step 18.4A, codec_context_is_hwaccel=true) plus the corrected strict no-software-fallback control (Step 18.4B, FIRST_FRAME_DECODED, allow_software_fallback=false) establish that the current environment decodes at least one canonical H.264 frame through a CUDA HWAccel configuration with software fallback explicitly disabled. F-0100 RESOLVED (canonical clip located, copied local-only, not committed). Step 18.4A strict control = INVALID_SUPPORTING_CONTROL_IMPLEMENTATION_DEFECT (historical, raw 9b4cc STRICT_PROBE_NO_FRAME, no evidentiary weight) — CORRECTED in Step 18.4B: FIRST_FRAME_DECODED (packets_examined=3, frames_decoded=1, frames_converted=1, container_closed=true; strict-control code 04c0dc1f, raw evidence ef589a1, accepted master base 547dc06e). Bounded: does NOT prove all production decode was hardware, that production fallback never occurred, or any speedup. Production-path actual_hardware_decode_active remains UNKNOWN_NOT_PROVEN by observer design. PYAV_HWACCEL_CUDA: REJECTED_SOURCE_MODEL_MISMATCH — existing source already requests HWAccel. PYAV_HARDWARE_DECODE_ACTIVATION_OR_FALLBACK_FIX: CONTRADICTED_BY_STRICT_NO_FALLBACK_CONTROL. Step 18.4A=done (OBSERVATION_COMPLETE, OUTCOME_D). Step 18.4B=done (FIRST_FRAME_DECODED, OUTCOME_S1). Step 18.4=done: the accepted negative terminal outcome T3_NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION satisfies the contract — no tested C1/C2/C3 candidate satisfies the parity, stability, and performance gates, so selected_optimization=NONE (no targeted optimization is implemented). Median run (run-01): 272.57s detect elapsed. Residual: 0.53s (0.19%) — down from 87.39s (33.0%) pre-instrumentation. Total decoder/frame advancement pipeline (pass1 + pass2): 172.46s (63.27%). Canonical signature: 8cc06c6accb055fb6fed461f2f4a96f0b288ef864b9423000b6f59d9ab56bc85 ✓ Benchmark series: hermes-600s-f0097-instrumented-20260713-acb424f/run-{01,02,03} Benchmark code HEAD: acb424f904bc4b3459f6ad2ceb9f8c701cedb69b Evidence builder HEAD: acb424f904bc4b3459f6ad2ceb9f8c701cedb69b Recovered master base: 836a456eee0312646747d755dfe838052eaa6752 Step 18.6 output parity gates defined in bottleneck_decision.json step18_6_output_parity_gates. Optimization-specific performance gate: PENDING_SELECTED_OPTIMIZATION. Broad quality tolerances (missed_slide_rate <= 5%, false_split_rate <= 10%) remain under V-M-PERF-DETECT-ACCEPTANCE / Step 18.8 only. Artifacts: - benchmarks/detect/evidence/aggregate_evidence.json - benchmarks/detect/evidence/bottleneck_decision.json - benchmarks/detect/evidence/bottleneck_decision.md

V-M-PERF-DETECT-TARGET-OPTIMIZATION-DISC.purpose: Discriminate remaining DECODE_FRAME_PIPELINE optimization candidates (C1-C4) using source semantics, exact frame parity, resource evidence, and focused microbenchmarks.

verification-contract.scenario-1: Three fresh production-equivalent complete sampled decodes classify exact cross-open byte repeatability from direct timestamp, shape, RGB hash, and complete signatures.
verification-contract.scenario-2: The C2 model records exact admission, eviction, six-second transition, strict tolerance, accepted-boundary handling, proof, complexity, and canonical peak resource measurements.
verification-contract.scenario-3: Live C3 inspection deterministically selects at most three variants from recorded fields and hard-fails eligible-boundary/zero-variant contradictions.
verification-contract.scenario-4: Stop terminal discrimination when baseline reference nondeterminism invalidates cross-open exact-byte gates; do not invent a tolerance.
verification-contract.scenario-5: Reject canonical SHA mismatch, abbreviated/non-commit/non-ancestor accepted bases, child/aggregate contradictions, duplicate JSON keys, or dirty evidence-code execution.
verification-contract.required-evidence: reference_repeatability.json, c1_status.json, c2_retention_model.json, c3_inspection.json, c3_variants.json, discrimination_evidence.json, discrimination_report.md, environment.json, plus conditional parity/run artifacts.
verification-contract.commands: python -m pytest tests/test_target_optimization_discrimination.py -v; ruff check changed Python; duplicate-key JSON validation; strict XML parsing; git diff --check
verification-contract.stop-condition: Do not produce a terminal candidate decision until committed clean correction code emits all applicable child artifacts and the aggregate agrees with them.

evidence.result: PASSED. The b869464/4b6eba5 package is REJECTED_FOR_STEP_18_4C_ACCEPTANCE because of C3_CODE_ARTIFACT_PROVENANCE_CONTRADICTION, unsupported C1 causality, and a C2 retain-all upper bound mislabeled as a required minimum. C1 0/84 and the 7,471,180,800-byte arithmetic remain historical observations only. C1 causal classification is UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED (codec_context_causal=false; the stream.codec_context code-path difference is a leading hypothesis, NOT an isolated cause). Outcome T3 and C3 NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_CONFIGURATION_VARIANT are not accepted. F-0102 is rejected draft context. Corrected evidence code 0bcfe540c62b5d1130ba2dbb3d067c46234062bb, tree a55759461374ac747b1e87e1611c544ce59ca969, raw commit b4ed0e40c2f9d86c0db41c2dd53106f945f2502c. REFERENCE_EXACTLY_REPEATABLE validates exact cross-open discrimination. C1=NOT_VIABLE_EXACT_PARITY_FAIL with causal classification UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED. C2 exact rolling model/semantics pass, peak 15 frames / 93,312,000 bytes, but performance fails (difference of medians -40.19553279999673s / -13.835416931263438%; median of paired differences -46.81963299999916s / -16.115451096192%; unstable). C3 selection PASS with thread_count_1/4/8; all exact parity PASS and all performance FAIL. Management outcome: the negative terminal outcome T3_NO_EVIDENCE_SUPPORTED_TARGET_OPTIMIZATION is accepted — no tested candidate is viable. F-0103 OPEN / NON_BLOCKING (ROOT_CAUSE_UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED; codec_context is a leading hypothesis, not an isolated cause; environment contribution not excluded). selected_optimization=NONE; Step 18.4=done; Step 18.4C=done; Step 18.5 planned/blocked and not started (implementation_started=false). Canonical signature provenance: 8cc06c6a... (original) vs 5a7c4538... (current); match=false; provenance classification ROOT_CAUSE_UNKNOWN_NOT_ISOLATED. The historical benchmark path at acb424f did not access stream.codec_context while the current path does — a proven code-path difference and leading hypothesis; causality NOT isolated (no controlled A/B varied ONLY that access). C2 taxonomy corrected: NOT_VIABLE_PERFORMANCE_FAIL (not NOT_VIABLE_RESOURCE_MODEL). Median terminology clarified: median_of_paired_differences vs difference_of_medians explicitly separated.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-TARGETED.purpose: Verify the single targeted optimization selected by Step 18.4. No optimization is selected while the bottleneck decision is incomplete. Step 18.5 remains blocked until Step 18.4 selects exactly one optimization with name, code boundaries, and hypothesis.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-SHORT-REBENCHMARK.purpose: Compare immutable short-video performance and quality before and after optimization.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-HERMES-REBENCHMARK.purpose: Run the full Hermes benchmark only after short-video re-benchmark acceptance.

V-M-PERF-DETECT-ACCEPTANCE.purpose: Detect performance acceptance gate: Hermes full run < 30 min, missed_slide_rate <= 5%, false_split_rate <= 10%, timestamp_error <= 1.5s.
